title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.475 - Other laws as applicable
text:
475.475.  Other laws as applicable. — Except where inconsistent with sections 475.380 to 475.480, the laws of this state relating to guardian and ward and the judicial practice relating thereto, including the right to trial by jury and the right of appeal, shall be applicable to such beneficiaries and their estates.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 4 § 21)
